articles.description: Rory McIlroy says he will have to play better on Sunday if he is to defend his Masters title after letting slip a six-shot lead at Augusta National.
articles.title: Masters 2026: Rory McIlroy can't stop riding Augusta rollercoaster

articles.description: What does Tyson Fury's comeback win mean for the heavyweight scene? And who could the Gypsy King fight next?
articles.title: Fury vs Joshua: What next for heavyweight division - including Moses Itauma, Derek Chisora & Anthony Joshua?

articles.description: Nine points clear with six games to play - could Arsenal still really blow the Premier League title from that position?
articles.title: Arsenal 1-2 Bournemouth: Could Gunners really blow Premier League title?

articles.description: Liverpool's 17-year-old star Rio Ngumoha stole the show against Fulham - will Arne Slot now start him against PSG?
articles.title: Rio Ngumoha: Will Arne Slot play Liverpool teenager against PSG?

articles.description: England star Ellie Kildunne says a record Women's Six Nations crowd of 77,120 at Allianz Stadium against Ireland is now becoming "the norm".
articles.title: Women's Six Nations 2026: Packed stadiums 'will be the norm' - Ellie Kildunne

articles.description: Barcelona move nine points clear of rivals Real Madrid at the top of La Liga with a comfortable win over Espanyol in the Catalan derby.
articles.title: Barcelona 4-1 Espanyol: Ferran Torres scores twice as Barca win Catalan derby

articles.description: Bayern Munich break the record for the most goals scored in a single Bundesliga season as they beat St Pauli 5-0 to open up a 12-point lead at the top of the table.
articles.title: St Pauli 0-5 Bayern Munich: Vincent Kompany's side break Bundesliga goals record to go 12 points clear

articles.description: Tyson Fury marks his return to the heavyweight mix with a composed points win over Arslanbek Makhmudo, before immediately turning ringside to call out Anthony Joshua.
articles.title: Fury vs Makhmudov: Briton calls out Anthony Joshua after comeback win

articles.description: Bournemouth have not lost a game since star forward Antoine Semenyo left for Manchester City in January - how have they done it?
articles.title: How Bournemouth moved on from losing Antoine Semenyo

articles.description: It is a Grand National to savour for Irish trainer Willie Mullins as he celebrates his third consecutive victory in the race at Aintree - equalling the record set by legendary trainer Vincent O'Brien.
articles.title: Grand National 2026: I Am Maximus wins a fourth race at Aintree for Willie Mullins
